rejectedObservations.observation: Operator-facing run summary selection is still implemented separately in the UI and server layers, so future preview-precedence changes can drift again even though the current fix is correct.
rejectedObservations.reason: Rejected as already documented in `.factory/library/architecture.md`, which already instructs workers to keep UI/TUI/API run-summary precedence aligned with the server-side heartbeat-run summary behavior, including structured `error` summaries.
